case_title: AMY HARRIS-TOKUNO VS. FUSE IMS L.L.C., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS-TOKUNO, AMY AS TO DEFENDANT FUSE IMS L.L.C., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA FUSE FASHION MAGAZINE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
